---
name: ha-addon-conventions
description: Home Assistant addon development conventions for this repository. Use when designing config.yaml schemas, writing S6 run scripts, setting up translations, debugging build strategies, or understanding CI/CD version detection. Covers schema type reference, per-addon build specifics, and bashio patterns.
---

# HA Addon Conventions

## version.yaml (simplified format)
- No `addon` field — `dirname` gives slug
- No `tag_prefix` — CI uniformly does `sed 's/^v//'` on all upstream tags
- `version` is the single source of truth (was `tracking.upstream_version`)
- `base_tag` stored without `v` prefix (e.g. `9.3.0`, not `v9.3.0`)
- Empty `base_tag` in `tracking` = non-debian-base addon (skip base_updated check)
- Example:
```yaml
version: "2.4.0"
source: github
repo: louislam/uptime-kuma
build_args:
  UPTIME_KUMA_VERSION: "${version}"
changelog:
  source: release_body
  mode: prepend
tracking:
  base_tag: "9.3.0"
  file_sha: ""
  build_num: 0
```
- `file_sha: ""` on new addon → CI detects first build & triggers `version_changed`
- `build_args` use `${version}` (clean) placeholder; CI also supports `${tag}` for Docker image refs
- `build_args` key name must match the ARG in Dockerfile
- Upstream tag transform is dead — removed from Release.yml; handle in build_args directly (e.g. `UPSTREAM_TAG: "v${version}"`)

## Build Strategies (per addon type)
| Strategy | Addons | Dockerfile pattern |
|---|---|---|
| HA base + binary download | lucky, filebrowser-quantum | `FROM debian-base` + `curl` binary from GitHub Release |
| Multi-stage source build | qinglong, qdtoday, baihu-panel, uptime-kuma | `FROM node/python/go:xxx AS builder` → `FROM debian-base` COPY |
| Upstream image ref | flaresolverr | `FROM upstream/image` + ENTRYPOINT wrapper |
| HA base + release JAR | alist-tvbox, alist-tvbox-standalone | `FROM debian-base` + JAR download |

## Uptime Kuma specific
- 3-stage Dockerfile: Apprise .deb download → Node.js source build → debian-base runtime
- Full upstream base2 parity: Chromium + MariaDB + nscd + cloudflared + fonts
- `npm run download-dist` in builder (GitHub tarball lacks `dist/`)
- `UPTIME_KUMA_WS_ORIGIN_CHECK=bypass` for HA Ingress WebSocket
- Healthcheck: `curl -sf http://127.0.0.1:3001/` (not Go binary)
- `PUPPETEER_SKIP_CHROMIUM_DOWNLOAD=1` — use system chromium
- Config dirs: `/config/uptime-kuma/data` (data symlink), `/config/uptime-kuma/mysql` (MariaDB symlink)

## FileBrowser Quantum specific
- Go static binary from `linux-${ARCH}-filebrowser` release assets
- yq downloaded separately for config generation
- No nginx needed — `server.baseURL` handles HA Ingress natively
- Default config generated by `00-init.sh` on first boot
- Auth methods: `password|noauth|proxy|oidc`

## FlareSolverr specific
- Upstream image `flaresolverr/flaresolverr:${UPSTREAM_TAG}` + HA rootfs overlay
- `dumb-init` as process manager (non-debian-base, no S6)
- Chromium patches: `/dev/shm` overflow fix + wrapper `sh→bash` for 140+
- `cap_add: SYS_ADMIN + IPC_LOCK`, `tmpfs: /dev/shm:size=256M`
- `VOLUME ["/data"]` kept (upstream image convention)
- 9 configurable env vars via HA options panel

## CI (Version_Check + Release)
- **Version_Check**: cron 6h + push (Dockerfile/rootfs/workflows) + workflow_dispatch
- Detects: version_changed > base_updated > file_changed > force_rebuild (priority order)
- Matrix: 6 params (addon/version/build_version/reason/base_tag/build_num)
- Release derives dockerfile/image/platforms from filesystem (config.yaml/version.yaml)
- debian-base API: `hassio-addons/addon-debian-base/releases/latest` → tag is `v9.3.0`
- Tag for changelog fetch: `v${VERSION}` with fallback to `${VERSION}` for non-v repos
- config.yaml version written with `build_version` (may include `-build.N`)
- Independent commits per addon after build → 3x retry pull+push
- changelog sources: `release_body` (default), `file` (URL), `tag_file` (GitHub Contents API)

## S6 overlay convention
- `rootfs/etc/cont-init.d/00-init.sh` — init (dirs, symlinks, config generation, data migration)
- `rootfs/etc/s6-overlay/s6-rc.d/<name>/run` — `#!/usr/bin/with-contenv bashio`, ends with `exec <app>`
- `rootfs/etc/s6-overlay/s6-rc.d/<name>/type` — content: `longrun`
- All addons use debian-base built-in S6 overlay (`init: false` in config.yaml)

## HA Addon convention
- `init: false` — debian-base has built-in S6
- `boot: manual` — user starts manually
- `ingress: true` + `ingress_port`
- `map: [config:rw]` minimum; add `ssl:ro`, `share:rw` as needed
- `arch: [aarch64, amd64]` default dual-arch
- No `VOLUME ["/config", "/data", "/share"]` — HAOS Supervisor auto-injects

## HA Addon Schema (source: `home-assistant/supervisor` → `supervisor/apps/options.py`)

### `options` 规则
- 值**必须**为原始类型 (str/bool/int)，不能写 `{description: "..."}` 对象 — Supervisor 把整个对象当值传给 `bashio::config`
- 描述文字放在 `translations/en.yaml` + `translations/zh-cn.yaml` 中（tailscale 模式）

### Schema 类型速查 (RGX: `RE_SCHEMA_ELEMENT`)

| 类型 | UI 渲染 | 验证器 | 注意事项 |
|------|---------|--------|----------|
| `bool` | 开关/滑块 | `vol.Boolean()` | |
| `str` / `str(min,max)` | 文本输入 | `vol.All(str, vol.Length(...))` | 空串 `""` 合法 |
| `int` / `int(min,max)` | 数字输入 | `vol.All(vol.Coerce(int), vol.Range(...))` | |
| `float` / `float(min,max)` | 数字输入 | `vol.All(vol.Coerce(float), vol.Range(...))` | |
| `password` / `password(min,max)` | 密码框 | `vol.All(str, vol.Length(...))` | SHA1 哈希后做泄露检查 |
| `email` | 文本(email) | `vol.Email()` | |
| `url` | 文本(url) | `vol.Url()` | URL 字段用此非 `str` |
| `match(regex)` | 文本 | `vol.Match(regex)(str(value))` | ⚠️ 空串不匹配 `.+` 会报错 |
| `list(a\|b\|c)` | 下拉框 | `vol.In(list)` | |
| `device(subsystem=...)` | 下拉框 | udev 设备查找 | |

- 所有类型末尾可加 `?` → 可选 → UI 中可留空
- 字符串"可选且可空"用 `str?`（非 `match(^.+$)?`）
- URL 字段用 `url?`（tailscale 模式）

### translations/ 格式
```yaml
---
configuration:
  option_key:
    name: 显示名称
    description: >-
      多行描述文字。
```

### run 脚本模式
```bash
#!/usr/bin/with-contenv bashio
# bool/int: 始终导出（options 默认值 = 应用默认值）
# str: 仅非空时导出，空则由应用使用内置默认值
val="$(bashio::config 'KEY')"
[ -n "${val}" ] && export KEY="${val}"
bashio::config.has_value 'KEY'  # true=用户显式设置, false=来自 options 默认值
```

## 其他约定
- **S6 内置时区**: `base-app-timezone` 服务自动处理 TZ — 禁止在 `environment` / `options` / `schema` / `Dockerfile ENV` 中设置 `TZ`。移除 `cont-init.d` 中的手动时区代码块及 apt-get 中的 `tzdata`
- **隐藏可选配置**: 参考 alexbelgium `cifsdomain` 模式 — 从 `options` 中省略（UI 中隐藏），在 `schema` 中以 `?` 类型保留，脚本中通过 `bashio::config` 第 2 参数提供默认值

## Docker Build Tips (debian-base)
- **Node version**: Bookworm ships Node.js 18; if the app needs >=20 (e.g. Vite/Tailwind v4), install via nodesource: `curl -fsSL https://deb.nodesource.com/setup_22.x | bash - && apt-get install -y nodejs`
- **Upstream source tarball**: GitHub archive lacks pre-built `dist/` — always run `npm run download-dist` after `npm ci`
- **Chromium**: add `cap_add: [SYS_ADMIN, IPC_LOCK]` in config.yaml; large `/dev/shm` causes arithmetic overflow → patch `/etc/chromium.d/dev-shm` helper
- **Chromium 140+**: wrapper script uses `==` (bashism) under `#!/bin/sh` → `sed '1s|/bin/sh|/bin/bash|' /usr/bin/chromium`
- **Windows `COPY rootfs /`**: Git on Windows strips Unix `+x` → S6 scripts fail with exit 126. Always add `RUN chmod a+x /etc/cont-init.d/*.sh /etc/s6-overlay/s6-rc.d/*/run` after `COPY rootfs /` (non-debian-base: `RUN chmod +x /entrypoint.sh`)

## CI Detail Reference
- **debian-base tag**: API returns `v9.3.0` format → always `sed 's/^v//'` before comparing with stored `base_tag`
- **New addon detection**: `tracking.file_sha` empty → CI treats as `version_changed` (first build)
- **Push retry**: 3 attempts `pull --rebase && push`, `exit 1` on final failure (not silent skip)
- **GitHub Packages**: old packages may be unwritable under new permission model → delete & recreate; avoid 2-char package names (triggers limits)
